header.title: Digital Marketing
header.description: Centralized platform marketing for your electrical services business. Manage your presence on Google, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and Facebook with professional tools for content creation, SEO, advertising, and analytics.

authNotice.title: Authentication Required
authNotice.description: In production, Digital Marketing tools require authentication. Role-based access control will restrict platform management based on user permissions. Currently in development mode for demonstration.

quickLinks.title: Getting Started
quickLinks.description: Role-based onboarding guide for the Digital Marketing section

quickLinks.title: Content Strategy
quickLinks.description: Editorial calendar, distribution channels, and content pipeline

platforms.title: Google
platforms.description: Business Profile, SEO, Tag Manager, Ads & Campaigns, Analytics, and Content Composer. Full ecosystem management.

platforms.title: LinkedIn
platforms.description: Company page management, professional post composer, article publishing, and B2B engagement strategy.

platforms.title: Twitter/X
platforms.description: Tweet composer with character limits, thread builder, hashtag strategy, and real-time engagement tracking.

platforms.title: Facebook
platforms.description: Business page management, post composer, event creation, community engagement, and Messenger configuration.
